description: Schema for configuring Istio Gateway, VirtualService, DestinationRule, and AuthorizationPolicy resources in the nuc-istio chart.

enabled.description: Enables or disables rendering of all chart resources.

nameOverride.description: Overrides the base name used for generated resource names.

generic.description: Common metadata applied to all rendered resources unless overridden locally.

labels.description: Labels added to all chart resources.

annotations.description: Annotations added to all chart resources.

global.description: Shared values consumed by this chart and compatible charts in the same release.

domain.description: Default domain suffix available for templating and host construction.

apiVersions.description: Overrides for Istio API versions used by rendered resources.

gateways.description: Map of Istio Gateway resources keyed by logical name.

virtualservices.description: Map of Istio VirtualService resources keyed by logical name.

destinationrules.description: Map of Istio DestinationRule resources keyed by logical name.

authorizationpolicies.description: Map of Istio AuthorizationPolicy resources keyed by logical name.

stringMap.description: Map of string keys to string values, typically used for labels or annotations.

port.description: Network port configuration used by an Istio Gateway server.

number.description: Port number exposed by the server.

name.description: Unique port name within the Gateway server list.

protocol.description: Protocol handled on this port, for example HTTP or HTTPS.

gatewayServer.description: Single server entry in an Istio Gateway.

port.description: Port definition for this Gateway server.

hosts.description: Hosts served by this Gateway server.

tls.description: Raw TLS settings forwarded to the Gateway server specification.

gateway.description: Istio Gateway specification rendered by the chart.

name.description: Explicit name for the rendered Gateway resource.

labels.description: Labels applied specifically to this Gateway.

annotations.description: Annotations applied specifically to this Gateway.

selector.description: Label selector identifying the Istio proxy workload that should serve this Gateway.

servers.description: List of Gateway servers exposed by this resource.

nullableGateway.description: Gateway configuration or null to disable a specific map entry.

virtualServiceHttpRoute.description: HTTP route entry inside an Istio VirtualService.

name.description: Optional route name used by Istio telemetry and debugging tools.

match.description: HTTP match conditions forwarded directly to the VirtualService route.

route.description: HTTP route destinations and weights forwarded directly to Istio.

retries.description: Retry policy applied to this HTTP route.

fault.description: Fault injection settings applied to this HTTP route.

timeout.description: Request timeout for this HTTP route.

rewrite.description: Rewrite rules applied before forwarding matched requests.

corsPolicy.description: CORS policy applied to this HTTP route.

virtualServiceTlsRoute.description: TLS route entry inside an Istio VirtualService.

match.description: TLS match conditions forwarded directly to Istio.

route.description: TLS route destinations forwarded directly to Istio.

virtualServiceTcpRoute.description: TCP route entry inside an Istio VirtualService.

match.description: TCP match conditions forwarded directly to Istio.

route.description: TCP route destinations forwarded directly to Istio.

virtualService.description: Istio VirtualService specification rendered by the chart.

name.description: Explicit name for the rendered VirtualService resource.

labels.description: Labels applied specifically to this VirtualService.

annotations.description: Annotations applied specifically to this VirtualService.

gateways.description: Gateway names bound to this VirtualService.

http.description: HTTP routing rules for this VirtualService.

tls.description: TLS routing rules for this VirtualService.

tcp.description: TCP routing rules for this VirtualService.

exportTo.description: Namespaces to which this VirtualService is exported.

nullableVirtualService.description: VirtualService configuration or null to disable a specific map entry.

destinationRuleSubset.description: Subset entry within an Istio DestinationRule.

name.description: Subset name referenced by routing rules.

labels.description: Workload labels selecting endpoints that belong to this subset.

trafficPolicy.description: Subset-specific traffic policy forwarded directly to Istio.

destinationRule.description: Istio DestinationRule specification rendered by the chart.

name.description: Explicit name for the rendered DestinationRule resource.

labels.description: Labels applied specifically to this DestinationRule.

annotations.description: Annotations applied specifically to this DestinationRule.

host.description: Service host to which this DestinationRule applies.

trafficPolicy.description: Top-level traffic policy forwarded directly to Istio.

subsets.description: Named subsets available for routing to different endpoint groups.

exportTo.description: Namespaces to which this DestinationRule is exported.

workloadSelector.description: Optional selector limiting this DestinationRule to matching workloads.

matchLabels.description: Labels used to match workloads affected by this DestinationRule.

nullableDestinationRule.description: DestinationRule configuration or null to disable a specific map entry.

authorizationPolicy.description: Istio AuthorizationPolicy specification rendered by the chart.

name.description: Explicit name for the rendered AuthorizationPolicy resource.

namespace.description: Namespace where the rendered AuthorizationPolicy should be created.

apiVersion.description: Explicit API version override for this AuthorizationPolicy.

labels.description: Labels applied specifically to this AuthorizationPolicy.

annotations.description: Annotations applied specifically to this AuthorizationPolicy.

selector.description: Optional workload selector for the AuthorizationPolicy.

action.description: Policy action, for example ALLOW or DENY.

rules.description: Authorization policy rules forwarded directly to Istio.

nullableAuthorizationPolicy.description: AuthorizationPolicy configuration or null to disable a specific map entry.
